mapper.sql: id , company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, picture, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark
mapper.select: SELECT t2.company_id as companyId, t2.sample_name as sampleName, t2.sample_code as sampleCode, t2.specs as specs, t2.batch_number as batchNumber, t2.manufacturer as manufacturer, t2.sample_origin as sampleOrigin, t2.outward as outward, t2.picture as picture, t2.save_place as savePlace, t2.admin as admin, t2.sample_groups as sampleGroups, t2.quantity_per_group as quantityPerGroup, t2.inspector as inspector, t2.received_date as receivedDate, t2.sample_requirement as sampleRequirement, t2.generation as generation, t2.state as state, t2.check_date as checkDate, t2.remark as remark, t2.product_id as productId, t1.sample_id as id FROM test_entrusted_sample_details_rel AS t1 LEFT JOIN test_sample AS t2 ON t1.sample_id = t2.id WHERE t1.entrustment_id = #{entrustmentId}

SELECT id, company_id, sample_name, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, picture, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark,product_id FROM test_sample
is_use = 0
and sample_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{sampleName},'%')
and batch_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{batchNumber},'%')
and manufacturer LIKE CONCAT('%',#{manufacturer},'%')
and sample_requirement LIKE CONCAT('%',#{receivedDate},'%')
and product_id = #{productId}
and company_id = #{companyId}
mapper.insert: insert into test_sample (id, company_id, sample_name, product_id, sample_code, specs, batch_number, manufacturer, sample_origin, outward, picture, save_place, admin, sample_groups, quantity_per_group, inspector, received_date, sample_requirement, generation, state, check_date, remark, insert_flag,is_use) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{productId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{specs,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insertFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},0)

insert into test_sample
id,
company_id,
sample_name,
sample_code,
specs,
batch_number,
manufacturer,
sample_origin,
outward,
picture,
save_place,
admin,
sample_groups,
quantity_per_group,
inspector,
received_date,
sample_requirement,
generation,
state,
check_date,
remark,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{specs,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update test_sample
company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sample_name = #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR},
sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
specs = #{specs,jdbcType=INTEGER},
batch_number = #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
picture = #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
save_place = #{savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
admin = #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_groups = #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER},
quantity_per_group = #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER},
inspector = #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR},
sample_requirement = #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
check_date = #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update test_sample
specs = #{specs,jdbcType=INTEGER},
generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR},
sample_requirement = #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where insert_flag = #{insertFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update test_sample set company_id = #{companyId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sample_name = #{sampleName,jdbcType=CHAR}, sample_code = #{sampleCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, specs = #{specs,jdbcType=INTEGER}, batch_number = #{batchNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_origin = #{sampleOrigin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, outward = #{outward,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, picture = #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
save_place = #{ savePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, admin = #{admin,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sample_groups = #{sampleGroups,jdbcType=INTEGER}, quantity_per_group = #{quantityPerGroup,jdbcType=INTEGER}, inspector = #{inspector,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, received_date = #{receivedDate,jdbcType=CHAR}, sample_requirement = #{sampleRequirement,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, generation = #{generation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, state = #{state,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, check_date = #{checkDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT t1.company_id companyId, t2.company_name companyName, t1.product_id productId, t1.sample_name sampleName, t1.specs specs, t1.manufacturer manufacturer, t1.sample_origin sampleOrigin, t1.outward outward, t1.save_place savePlace, t1.admin admin, t1.sample_groups sampleGroups, t1.quantity_per_group quantityPerGroup, t1.inspector inspector, t1.received_date receivedDate, t1.sample_requirement sampleRequirement, t1.generation generation, t1.insert_flag insertFlag FROM test_sample t1 LEFT JOIN test_company t2 ON t1.company_id = t2.company_id where insert_flag = #{insertFlag}
SELECT sample_code sampleCode, sample_name sampleName, specs, outward FROM test_sample WHERE id = #{sampleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT into test_entrusted_sample_details_rel(id, sample_id, entrustment_id) VALUES (id, #{sampleId}, #{entrustmentId})
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(SUBSTR(sample_code, 9, 4)) maxNum FROM test_sample WHERE sample_code LIKE CONCAT('%-', #{year}, '-%')
SELECT sample_name sampleName, sample_code sampleNumber, quantity_per_group sampleQuantity, outward sampleDesc, received_date sampleTime FROM test_sample WHERE id = #{sampleId}
